requirement_topic.en: CE Marking — LVD / EMC Directives and Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志——低压指令、电磁兼容指令及欧盟《电池法规》2023/1542合格性
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌——低壓指令、電磁相容指令及歐盟《電池法規》2023/1542合格性

summary.en: Sodium-ion (Na-ion) battery energy storage systems placed on the EU market must bear the CE mark, demonstrating conformity with all applicable EU legislation. At minimum this covers the Low Voltage Directive (LVD 2014/35/EU), the EMC Directive (2014/30/EU), and the EU Battery Regulation (Regulation (EU) 2023/1542). Regulation 2023/1542 is chemistry-neutral and explicitly covers all rechargeable industrial and stationary batteries regardless of electrochemical technology; Na-ion cells fall within its scope. CE conformity assessment for LVD and EMC is typically performed via Module A (internal production control with self-declaration). Conformity assessment routes under Regulation 2023/1542 depend on battery category and applicable performance class; the performance threshold delegated act for industrial batteries is due by 18 August 2026 (statutory Commission deadline) but has not been adopted as of mid-2026 — no Na-ion-specific carve-out is expected. An EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) and technical documentation file must be compiled before the CE mark is affixed.
summary.zh: 投放欧盟市场的钠离子（Na-ion）电池储能系统须加贴CE标志，以证明符合所有适用欧盟法规的要求。最低限度须涵盖《低压指令》（LVD 2014/35/EU）、《电磁兼容指令》（2014/30/EU）及欧盟《电池法规》（2023/1542号法规）。2023/1542号法规与电化学技术无关，明确涵盖所有可充电工业及固定储能电池，钠离子电芯属于其适用范围。LVD和EMC指令下的合格评定通常采用模块A（带自我声明的内部生产控制）。2023/1542号法规下的合格评定路径取决于电池类别及适用性能等级，相关实施法案仍在制定中。在加贴CE标志前须汇编欧盟合格声明（DoC）及技术文件。【未经核实：2023/1542号法规就固定储能钠离子BESS的模块分配及性能门槛仍取决于截至2026年6月12日尚未完全通过的授权及实施法案。】
summary.zht: 投放歐盟市場的鈉離子（Na-ion）電池儲能系統須加貼CE標誌，以證明符合所有適用歐盟法規的要求。最低限度須涵蓋《低壓指令》（LVD 2014/35/EU）、《電磁相容指令》（2014/30/EU）及歐盟《電池法規》（2023/1542號法規）。2023/1542號法規與電化學技術無關，明確涵蓋所有可充電工業及固定儲能電池，鈉離子電芯屬於其適用範圍。LVD和EMC指令下的合格評定通常採用模組A（帶自我聲明的內部生產控制）。2023/1542號法規下的合格評定路徑取決於電池類別及適用性能等級，相關實施法案仍在制定中。在加貼CE標誌前須彙編歐盟合格聲明（DoC）及技術文件。【未經核實：2023/1542號法規就固定儲能鈉離子BESS的模組分配及性能門檻仍取決於截至2026年6月12日尚未完全通過的授權及實施法案。】

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 of the European Parliament and of the Council concerning batteries and waste batteries — Art. 6-10 (sustainability and safety requirements), Art. 17-20 (EU declaration of conformity and conformity assessment)
Decision No 768/2008/EC — Module A (internal production control)

EN IEC 62619:2022 (safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable, stationary and motive applications — also referenced for non-lithium stationary chemistry pending Na-ion specific standards)
EN 61000-6-2 / EN 61000-6-4 (generic EMC immunity and emission for industrial environments)

summary.en: No direct equivalent. China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — administered by CNCA / CQC — covers certain electrical products for the domestic Chinese market but does not extend to stationary Na-ion BESS in a scope equivalent to EU CE marking. Chinese Na-ion BESS products for the domestic market may reference GB/T 36558 (general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems) and GB/T 44265-2024 (sodium-ion battery technical specifications for stationary storage, effective March 2025); these standards do not confer EU market access. The CQC voluntary certification programme (CQC13-464292-2025) aligned with GB/T 44265-2024 is available from 2025 but is not a CCC mandatory scheme. Na-ion stationary batteries are not listed as a mandatory CCC product category as of mid-2026. CCC is not a substitute for CE marking under LVD, EMC Directive, or Regulation 2023/1542.
summary.zh: 无直接等价制度。中国强制认证（CCC）由CNCA/CQC主管，覆盖国内市场的部分电气产品，但其范围不等同于欧盟CE标志对固定储能钠离子BESS的要求。面向国内市场的中国钠离子BESS产品可参照GB/T 36558（电化学储能系统通用技术要求）及SAC/TC114正在制定的钠离子专项标准，但上述标准不赋予欧盟市场准入资格。CCC认证不能替代LVD、EMC指令或2023/1542号法规下的CE标志。【未经核实：截至2026年6月12日，钠离子专项强制CCC产品类别收录状态尚未得到确认。】
summary.zht: 無直接等價制度。中國強制認證（CCC）由CNCA/CQC主管，涵蓋國內市場的部分電氣產品，但其範圍不等同於歐盟CE標誌對固定儲能鈉離子BESS的要求。面向國內市場的中國鈉離子BESS產品可參照GB/T 36558（電化學儲能系統通用技術要求）及SAC/TC114正在制定的鈉離子專項標準，但上述標準不賦予歐盟市場準入資格。CCC認證不能替代LVD、EMC指令或2023/1542號法規下的CE標誌。【未經核實：截至2026年6月12日，鈉離子專項強制CCC產品類別收錄狀態尚未得到確認。】

standards_or_laws: CCC scheme — administered under Regulations on Compulsory Product Certification (State Council Order No. 117, 2001, as amended)
GB/T 36558-2022 (general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems)
GB/T 34131-2023 (safety requirements for battery management systems in energy storage)

gap.en: Chinese Na-ion BESS manufacturers must obtain CE marking under LVD, EMC Directive, and Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 before EU market entry. The compliance gap is structurally identical to Li-ion BESS: CCC satisfies none of these requirements, and separate EU-specific conformity assessment, technical documentation, and self-declaration must be completed. Na-ion technology may face an additional gap where harmonised test standards under IEC / CENELEC specific to Na-ion chemistry are still emerging, potentially requiring deviation justification in the technical file. Manufacturers should monitor EUR-Lex for implementing acts under Regulation 2023/1542 that define final performance thresholds.
gap.zh: 中国钠离子BESS制造商在进入欧盟市场前须依据LVD、EMC指令及2023/1542号法规取得CE标志。合规差距在结构上与锂离子BESS完全一致：CCC认证无法满足上述任一要求，须单独完成欧盟专项合格评定、汇编技术文件并出具自我声明。由于针对钠离子化学体系的IEC/CENELEC协调测试标准仍在发展中，钠离子技术可能面临额外差距，技术文件中或需提供偏差说明。制造商应持续关注EUR-Lex发布的2023/1542号法规实施法案，以掌握最终性能门槛要求。
gap.zht: 中國鈉離子BESS製造商在進入歐盟市場前須依據LVD、EMC指令及2023/1542號法規取得CE標誌。合規差距在結構上與鋰離子BESS完全一致：CCC認證無法滿足上述任一要求，須單獨完成歐盟專項合格評定、彙編技術文件並出具自我聲明。由於針對鈉離子化學體系的IEC/CENELEC協調測試標準仍在發展中，鈉離子技術可能面臨額外差距，技術文件中或需提供偏差說明。製造商應持續關注EUR-Lex發布的2023/1542號法規實施法案，以掌握最終性能門檻要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD, EMC Directive, and Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 required before placing Na-ion BESS on the EU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC for applicable domestic product categories; stationary Na-ion BESS scope and category listing status differs from EU requirements

source.publisher: EUR-Lex — European Parliament and of the Council

compliance_verdict.en: Gap identified. CE marking under LVD, EMC Directive, and Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 is mandatory for EU market access; CCC provides no equivalence. The gap is structurally the same as for Li-ion BESS, with a potential additional gap on Na-ion-specific harmonised standards. This is an informational summary only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距。依据LVD、EMC指令及欧盟2023/1542号法规的CE标志是进入欧盟市场的强制性要求，CCC认证不具等效性。差距在结构上与锂离子BESS相同，钠离子专项协调标准方面可能存在额外差距。本摘要仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距。依據LVD、EMC指令及歐盟2023/1542號法規的CE標誌是進入歐盟市場的強制性要求，CCC認證不具等效性。差距在結構上與鋰離子BESS相同，鈉離子專項協調標準方面可能存在額外差距。本摘要僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: Economic Operator / Authorised Representative (Reg 2019/1020) — WEEE and Battery Regulation Producer Registration and Take-back
requirement_topic.zh: 经济经营者 / 授权代表（2019/1020号法规）——WEEE及《电池法规》生产者注册与回收义务
requirement_topic.zht: 經濟經營者 / 授權代表（2019/1020號法規）——WEEE及《電池法規》生產者註冊與回收義務

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 on market surveillance and compliance of products requires that any product placed on the EU market has an identifiable responsible economic operator established within the EU. For a non-EU manufacturer this means appointing an EU-based authorised representative who holds the technical documentation, can cooperate with market surveillance authorities, and is identified on the product or its packaging. Separately, Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 (Battery Regulation, Art. 56-61) and the WEEE Directive (2012/19/EU, Art. 16-17) impose extended producer responsibility (EPR) obligations: manufacturers, importers, or their authorised representatives acting as producers must register with national battery and WEEE producer registers in each EU member state where products are placed on the market, and must participate in or fund take-back and collection schemes. Regulation 2023/1542 is chemistry-neutral; Na-ion batteries are within scope. The precise classification of stationary Na-ion BESS under Regulation 2023/1542 Art. 3 (industrial battery vs. stationary battery category) remains subject to implementing acts in development as of mid-2026; the distinction affects which specific EPR and performance requirements apply but does not affect whether the Regulation applies at all.
summary.zh: 欧盟《市场监督与产品合规法规》（2019/1020号法规）要求任何投放欧盟市场的产品须在欧盟境内有可识别的责任经济经营者。对于非欧盟制造商而言，这意味着须指定一名欧盟境内的授权代表，该代表持有技术文件、可与市场监督机构合作，并在产品或包装上注明。此外，欧盟《电池法规》（2023/1542号法规第56–61条）和《废弃电气电子设备指令》（WEEE 2012/19/EU第16–17条）规定了延伸生产者责任（EPR）义务：制造商、进口商或以生产者身份行事的授权代表须在每个销售成员国的国家电池及WEEE生产者登记册中完成注册，并参与或资助回收与收集计划。2023/1542号法规与电化学技术无关，钠离子电池属于其适用范围。【未经核实：2023/1542号法规就固定储能钠离子BESS生产者义务的确切范围——包括其依据第3条是否属于工业电池或固定储能电池——仍取决于截至2026年6月12日尚在制定中的实施法案。】
summary.zht: 歐盟《市場監督與產品合規法規》（2019/1020號法規）要求任何投放歐盟市場的產品須在歐盟境內有可識別的責任經濟經營者。對於非歐盟製造商而言，這意味著須指定一名歐盟境內的授權代表，該代表持有技術文件、可與市場監督機構合作，並在產品或包裝上註明。此外，歐盟《電池法規》（2023/1542號法規第56–61條）和《廢棄電氣電子設備指令》（WEEE 2012/19/EU第16–17條）規定了延伸生產者責任（EPR）義務：製造商、進口商或以生產者身份行事的授權代表須在每個銷售成員國的國家電池及WEEE生產者登記冊中完成註冊，並參與或資助回收與收集計劃。2023/1542號法規與電化學技術無關，鈉離子電池屬於其適用範圍。【未經核實：2023/1542號法規就固定儲能鈉離子BESS生產者義務的確切範圍——包括其依據第3條是否屬於工業電池或固定儲能電池——仍取決於截至2026年6月12日尚在制定中的實施法案。】

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 of the European Parliament and of the Council on market surveillance and compliance of products — Art. 4 (tasks of economic operators), Art. 5 (tasks of authorised representative)
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 (Battery Regulation) — Art. 3 (definitions: industrial battery, stationary battery), Art. 56-61 (extended producer responsibility, registration, take-back and collection)
Directive 2012/19/EU (WEEE Directive) — Art. 16 (registration of producers), Art. 17 (reporting obligations)

summary.en: No equivalent obligation exists under Chinese domestic regulation. Chinese manufacturers are not required to appoint an EU authorised representative, register with EU national battery or WEEE producer registers, or fund EU take-back schemes. China maintains a domestic extended producer responsibility framework for waste electrical and electronic products under the Management Measures for the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (State Council, 2011, amended 2016), but this applies solely within China and does not extend to the product categories or obligations under EU Regulation 2019/1020 or Regulation 2023/1542. There is no Chinese regulatory equivalent to EU producer registration in member states or to Battery Regulation take-back and collection obligations.
summary.zh: 中国国内法规中不存在等价义务。中国制造商无需指定欧盟授权代表、向欧盟各成员国电池或WEEE生产者登记册注册，或资助欧盟回收计划。中国依据《废弃电器电子产品回收处理管理条例》（国务院，2011年，2016年修订）建立了国内废旧电气电子产品延伸生产者责任框架，但该框架仅适用于中国境内，不涵盖欧盟2019/1020号法规或2023/1542号法规下的产品类别或义务。中国法规中不存在欧盟成员国生产者注册或《电池法规》回收义务的等价制度。
summary.zht: 中國國內法規中不存在等價義務。中國製造商無需指定歐盟授權代表、向歐盟各成員國電池或WEEE生產者登記冊註冊，或資助歐盟回收計劃。中國依據《廢棄電器電子產品回收處理管理條例》（國務院，2011年，2016年修訂）建立了國內廢舊電氣電子產品延伸生產者責任框架，但該框架僅適用於中國境內，不涵蓋歐盟2019/1020號法規或2023/1542號法規下的產品類別或義務。中國法規中不存在歐盟成員國生產者註冊或《電池法規》回收義務的等價制度。

standards_or_laws: Management Measures for the Recovery and Disposal of Waste Electrical and Electronic Products (State Council Order No. 551, 2011, amended 2016) — domestic EPR only, not equivalent to EU obligations
No Chinese equivalent to Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 authorised representative requirement
No Chinese equivalent to Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 producer registration and take-back obligations

gap.en: Chinese Na-ion BESS manufacturers without an EU establishment must appoint an EU authorised representative under Regulation 2019/1020 before EU market entry. They must also register as producers — or ensure their EU importer or representative registers — with national battery producer registers and WEEE registers in every EU member state where products are sold, and must participate in or fund take-back and collection arrangements under Regulation 2023/1542 and the WEEE Directive. The gap is structurally identical to the Li-ion BESS case: these obligations are entirely absent from the Chinese domestic compliance framework. Multi-country EPR registration and ongoing reporting duties represent a significant ongoing operational cost. Na-ion batteries may face definitional uncertainty under Regulation 2023/1542 Art. 3 (industrial vs. stationary battery category) pending implementing acts.
gap.zh: 在欧盟无设立机构的中国钠离子BESS制造商在进入欧盟市场前须依据2019/1020号法规指定欧盟授权代表。同时，还须以生产者身份在每个欧盟销售成员国的国家电池生产者登记册及WEEE登记册中完成注册——或确保其欧盟进口商或代表完成注册——并须依据2023/1542号法规和WEEE指令参与或资助回收与收集安排。差距在结构上与锂离子BESS完全一致：上述义务在中国国内合规框架中完全缺失。多国EPR注册及持续报告义务构成重大的持续运营成本。在实施法案发布之前，钠离子电池在2023/1542号法规第3条下的类别认定（工业电池还是固定储能电池）可能存在不确定性。
gap.zht: 在歐盟無設立機構的中國鈉離子BESS製造商在進入歐盟市場前須依據2019/1020號法規指定歐盟授權代表。同時，還須以生產者身份在每個歐盟銷售成員國的國家電池生產者登記冊及WEEE登記冊中完成註冊——或確保其歐盟進口商或代表完成註冊——並須依據2023/1542號法規和WEEE指令參與或資助回收與收集安排。差距在結構上與鋰離子BESS完全一致：上述義務在中國國內合規框架中完全缺失。多國EPR註冊及持續報告義務構成重大的持續運營成本。在實施法案發布之前，鈉離子電池在2023/1542號法規第3條下的類別認定（工業電池還是固定儲能電池）可能存在不確定性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EU authorised representative required under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020; battery and WEEE producer registration required per member state under Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 and Directive 2012/19/EU
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement under Chinese domestic regulation

source.publisher: EUR-Lex — European Parliament and of the Council

compliance_verdict.en: Gap identified. Appointment of an EU authorised representative and producer registration under the Battery Regulation and WEEE Directive are mandatory structural requirements with no Chinese domestic equivalent. The gap is identical in nature to the Li-ion BESS case. Multi-country registration is required for multi-market EU sales. This is an informational summary only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距。指定欧盟授权代表及依据《电池法规》和WEEE指令完成生产者注册，是强制性结构性要求，中国国内无等价制度。差距性质与锂离子BESS完全相同。在多个欧盟成员国销售时须完成多国注册。本摘要仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距。指定歐盟授權代表及依據《電池法規》和WEEE指令完成生產者註冊，是強制性結構性要求，中國國內無等價制度。差距性質與鋰離子BESS完全相同。在多個歐盟成員國銷售時須完成多國註冊。本摘要僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
